title: 皐月賞の後に・すべてのウマ娘の憧れ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky's performance at the Satsuki Sho is
absolute perfection, and she declares herself a
worthy athlete to chase after.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Special Week and Grass Wonder, who saw
Maruzensky run, both vow to catch up to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smiling in response, Maruzensky says that she'll
do her best to live up to their expectations in the
Japanese Derby.
